text: I feel a sense of curiosity and wonder in this bright, modern environment. The glass walls and clean lines of the entryway signal that I'm about to enter a carefully structured space devoted to ideas or learning. As I step further in, the vibrant display about "R+D"—Research and Development—calls to mind themes of progress and collaboration between humans and machines. The immersive visuals and accessible displays invite me to pause and reflect on the intersection of technology and human life. Overall, I feel both stimulated and contemplative, keen to explore the knowledge and innovation on offer here.
